homepage.title: Fantic Games - Game Art Outsourcing for Indie & AAA Studios
homepage.description: From indie to AAA, we bring your vision to life with top-tier game art - on time, every time. Reliable outsourcing for stunning visuals.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Fantic Games - Game Art Outsourcing for Indie & AAA Studios
Close
Why to level up your game with us?
Over two decades of pushing graphic boundaries – Fanatic Games is the choice of industry leaders to bring their boldest visions to life
80+
Game Titles
Mafia III, Borderlands: The Handsome Collection, Mafia Definitive Edition, Gray Zone Warfare, Vigor, F1 Manager 22, Oblivion, and Hood: Outlaws & Legends. We’ve contributed to over 80 games — and that was just the warm-up.
40+
People
We are a team of 40+ creative professionals – game artists, 3D graphic designers, 2D artists, and experienced art supervisors, ready to elevate your project.
50+
Clients
We’ve had the privilege of collaborating with over 50 clients, including industry leaders like 2K, Frontier Developments, Rovio Entertainment Corporation, Insomniac Games, Wargaming,  Hangar 13, Focus Home Interactive, MADFINGER Games
The Unique
Benefits
We Bring
Your game deserves instant action. Our ready-to-go 2D and 3D artists deliver stunning results without delays. Focus on your vision — we’ll handle the art
Get Started Today
Maximized Revenue and Day-One Sales
Imagine game assets that not only captivate players but also drive impressive day-one sales. With Fanatic Games' expertise in creating top-tier assets for AAA titles, your game will grab attention from the start, giving you a strong launch and maximizing early revenue – all without the stress.
Streamlined Production and Asset Management
Time is money, and we get that. Our efficient workflows and transparent management systems keep production smooth, so you don’t have to chase updates or worry about bottlenecks. We handle everything, keeping you on budget and on schedule.
Faster Prototyping for Creative Innovation
You need to test ideas fast, and we’re here to help. Our rapid prototyping ensures you can focus on creative decisions without getting bogged down in production delays. We iterate quickly, so you can make informed decisions and move forward with confidence.
High-Quality Art and Player Immersion
Quality is non-negotiable. Our team of experts delivers visually stunning assets that meet your exact specifications, from photorealistic environments to immersive characters. With over 20 years of experience, we make sure your players are as captivated as you are.
Scalable Solutions with On-Time Delivery
Whether your game is a massive AAA production or a tight indie project, we’ve got you covered. Fanatic Games scales to your needs, ensuring your assets are ready on time, so you can hit your launch date without compromise.
Clear Communication and Collaboration
You don’t have time for miscommunication. With our real-time progress tracking and dedicated support, you’ll always know exactly where your assets stand. No surprises, just clear, honest updates that keep you in control and your project moving forward.
Top-Level Security and Compliance

about.text:
About Us - Fanatic Games
Close
Founded in 2000 in Czech Republic, Fanatic Games is a leader in video game art outsourcing.
We bring game developers' visions to life by delivering top-tier 3D models, environments, vehicles, characters, and concept art, ready for seamless integration into any game engine. Whether it's a AAA title or an indie project, our team of over 40 experienced artists ensures that every asset meets your technical requirements.
At Fanatic Games, we simplify the development process through transparent communication and a personalized approach. You’ll stay informed at every stage, with full support and immediate solutions to any challenges. Our track record of contributing to iconic games speaks to our dedication to delivering exceptional results, on time and on budget.
With over 20 years of experience, we are passionate about creative excellence and building long-term partnerships. Our goal is to help studios of all sizes achieve their artistic visions without complications.
Our ambition is to continue growing.
Experience & Values
From Humble Beginnings to Cutting-Edge Innovation
Experience
We began our journey at the dawn of 3D graphics, when models were simple low-poly shapes and 128x128 textures. Today, we work with high-poly models, PBR textures, and more, adapting to modern tools like Substance Painter, Rizom UV, Blender, Plasticity, and Unreal Engine. We're also exploring AI-driven solutions to push the boundaries of what's possible.
Our expertise includes high-poly modeling, normal and AO map baking, Unreal Engine integration, and creating hyper-realistic materials. We stay ahead by continually learning and evolving with industry trends.
Now, with a global presence in Europe, the USA, Australia, and South Korea, we've also expanded into the advertising sector, using game engines to unlock new creative opportunities.
Core Values
Transparent Communication
We maintain clear, honest dialogue with clients, ensuring they understand our process and stay informed at every stage.
Realistic Promises
We set achievable expectations based on our experience, avoiding over-promising or unrealistic commitments.
Client-Centered Approach
Our priority is the client’s success, which means being upfront about potential challenges and offering effective solutions.
Ethical Decision-Making
If a project doesn't align with our capabilities or timeline, we inform the client immediately to prevent any negative impact.
Budget-Conscious Solutions
We develop workflows that align with the client’s budget, delivering quality results without exceeding financial limits.
Renowned Brands & Game Titles We Collaborate With
Our team of 40+ Professionals
We are a team of 40+ creative professionals – game artists, 3D graphic designers, 2D artists, and experienced art supervisors, ready to elevate your project.
Leadership

products.text:
Services - Fanatic Games
Close
Environments & Buildings
Immersive 3D environments for any setting - urban, nature, or fantasy. We blend architecture, textures, and optimization to craft photorealistic or stylized worlds, ready for any game engine.
Show More
Hardsurface & Vehicles
Detailed 3D models of vehicles, weapons, and machines. Realistic or stylized designs tailored to your style and specs, fully optimized for seamless game engine integration.
Show More
Props & Objects
Game-ready props and equipment - realistic or stylized, optimized for performance. From small objects to key items, we design assets that enhance your game world.
Show More
Characters, Clothing & Equipment
Full 3D character creation - heroes, NPCs, creatures, realistic or stylized. Designed and optimized for seamless integration into your game engine.
Show More
2D Art & Illustration
Concept art, character designs, and environments. From in-game assets to promotional illustrations, we capture your game's style, from realistic to cartoony.
Show More
Game Asset Integration
Smooth engine integration of models, textures, and assets. We handle optimization, shaders, and light maps for peak performance on any engine.
Show More
LOD Creation & Asset Optimization
Efficient LOD creation and asset optimization for all platforms. We reduce memory use and boost performance, ensuring smooth gameplay.
Show More
Rigging & Skinning
Professional rigging and skinning for characters and objects, ready for smooth, realistic animations and game engine compatibility.
Show More
